# BP-145 positive: a pgx pool connection is acquired and never released.
lang: go
file: BP-145-vulnerable.go
variant: pgxpool
---
package sample

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func load(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
	conn, err := pool.Acquire(ctx)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_, err = conn.Exec(ctx, "SELECT 1")
	return err
}
